title: Maxon's Minor Fabric Tweaks (MMFT)
description: Adds a drop to Wardens, Craftable Totems, and an Easy Gunpowder Recipie
body:
# -!IMPORTANT!-
This mod will no longer be updated, as I made it a long time ago and it is no longer up to my standards, so it will be archived.
## Totem Shards
The new and now only drop of the Evoker is a Totem Shard! 3 of these combined with a Soul Catalyst and some can be used to craft a Totem of Undying! I pretty much added this to try to balance raid farms, with the new main appeal of them being redstone and other witch drops. This makes Totems more rare, and harder to obtain.

## Soul Catalyst
A soul catalyst, as mentioned above, currently only has the use for making totems. If you have any other ideas for what it should do, please let me know. It has replaced the sculk catalyst as the Warden's drop.

## Sodium and Saltwater
You can obtain a bottle of saltwater by combining a water bottle and clay. If you smelt the bottle, it gives you sodium. If you combine sodium and gravel, you can make gunpowder. I added this because I thought that gunpowder was too time consuming to get without a farm.
